response: The head coach of the Georgia Tech football team that finished the regular season with the same record as the 1981 team was **George O'Leary**. O'Leary served as the interim head coach for Georgia Tech's football team in 2001, but he also coached in 1981 when he was the defensive coordinator. The 1981 team finished with a 1–10 record, and O'Leary was the defensive coordinator during that season.
